Habitat_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "A714A876462AA5564217DA976152171B", "You are not the first to explore these caverns, after all...

In your explorations, you will come across locations that may yield valuable equipment or building plans, contain usable Facilities, hide collectable journal logs, and more.

Some locations, like this Habitat, may be safe havens where your oxygen level will not decrease. 
Some locations may require you to perform tasks before they become safe, or provide shortcuts.

Use these locations as stepping stones in your exploration ever-deeper into the depths.")
